measured.note: Same 36px off-grid violation as desktop. Not responsive-adjusted at this breakpoint.

measured.element: list card separator (md:space-y-2.5 still active at 768px)
measured.note: Tailwind md: prefix activates at >=768px, so space-y-2.5 (10px) is applied at this exact breakpoint. Off-grid.

dom-snippet: Same selectors as 1280px. The md: breakpoint triggers at >= 768px inclusive.
